flashy.gui.theme module

flashy.gui.theme.generate_palette(file_path=None)

Palette generated by “Save palette” option of Qt Designer.

Adapted from code by Tuhin Srivastava. Used with permission from the author.

Original source: https://gist.github.com/Tuhin-thinks/94df76e276243a651cb70aed0faa9c18

Modifications by Jean-Emmanuel Chouinard:

  • Updated dependencies (PyQt5 –> PySide6)

  • Changed function name (parse_xml –> generate_palette)

Return type:

QPalette

flashy.gui.theme.get_pen(index, width=1)
